purpose: Reusable accessible selector for the three MMG Knowledge Subscription cadence variants across the subscription product page, membership landing page, cart invitation workflow, and future customer plan-change surfaces.

render_parameters.mmg_selector_product: Optional Shopify product object. Falls back to all_products['mmg-knowledge-subscription'].
render_parameters.mmg_selector_context: Stable placement identifier used in data attributes and emitted events.
render_parameters.mmg_selector_instance_id: Optional unique instance seed when more than one selector is rendered in the same section and context.

progressive_enhancement.without_javascript: Native required radio and checkbox validation submits the Shopify product form with id and selling_plan.
progressive_enhancement.with_javascript: Updates the selected-plan summary, selling-plan value, submit state, and integration events.
progressive_enhancement.missing_product_or_selling_plan: Renders a customer-safe temporarily unavailable status and does not expose a broken purchase form.

release_gates: The Shopify subscription product is provisioned with the exact canonical handle.
All three variants exist with exact titles, prices, and entitlements.
Every variant has an available selling plan allocation.
No plan is selected by default.
Recurring consent is unchecked and required.
The selected variant and selling plan submit through the Shopify product form.
The component works in one-column mobile and three-column desktop layouts.
Keyboard, focus, live-region, reduced-motion, and no-JavaScript behavior pass QA.
The component is not published before subscription terms and customer-service language are approved.
